[[File:Mod3_swsf.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Mod-3 aboard ''[[Guardian Mantis]]''.]]
'''Mod-3''' was an [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]] owned by [[Vana Sage]] during her time working for the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] prior to the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]. He served as Sage's co-pilot and in-flight [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech]] aboard her [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the ''[[Guardian Mantis]]''. Mod-3 was hardwired into the ship and could not be removed.

{{Droid-stub}}
